requirement_topic.en: China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 Baseline vs Oman Evidence Package
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线与阿曼证据包
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線與阿曼證據包

summary.en: An Oman evidence package for imported EV chargers should be built around the actual destination use case: DGSM or customs scope, IEC 61851 safety evidence where requested, IEC 62196 connector choice where requested, distributor grid connection, local labels and manuals, installation method statements, commissioning records, warranty and maintenance obligations, and operator cybersecurity or payment-system requirements where relevant.
summary.zh: 进口电动汽车充电桩的阿曼证据包应围绕实际目的地用途建立：DGSM或海关适用范围、按需提供的IEC 61851安全证据、按需提供的IEC 62196接口选择、配电商并网、本地标签和说明书、安装方法说明、调试记录、质保和维护义务，以及适用时的运营方网络安全或支付系统要求。
summary.zht: 進口電動汽車充電樁的阿曼證據包應圍繞實際目的地用途建立：DGSM或海關適用範圍、按需提供的IEC 61851安全證據、按需提供的IEC 62196接口選擇、配電商併網、本地標籤和說明書、安裝方法說明、調試記錄、質保和維護義務，以及適用時的運營方網絡安全或支付系統要求。

standards_or_laws: DGSM and Oman customs scope documentation
APSR-regulated utility and licensed distributor connection requirements
Project tender, fleet, landlord, or charge-point-operator requirements

summary.en: China baseline files commonly include GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging systems, GB/T 20234.1-2023 for general connection-device requirements, GB/T 20234.2-2015 for AC charging interfaces, GB/T 20234.3-2023 for DC charging interfaces, GB/T 27930-2023 for off-board charger to BMS communication, domestic EMC or safety reports, Chinese labels, factory inspection records, and local grid acceptance. These are useful source documents but should be translated, mapped, and supplemented for Oman.
summary.zh: 中国基线资料通常包括传导充电系统GB/T 18487.1-2023、连接装置通用要求GB/T 20234.1-2023、交流充电接口GB/T 20234.2-2015、直流充电接口GB/T 20234.3-2023、非车载充电机与电池管理系统通信GB/T 27930-2023、国内EMC或安全报告、中文标签、工厂检验记录和本地并网验收。这些是有用的源文件，但应为阿曼进行翻译、映射和补充。
summary.zht: 中國基線資料通常包括傳導充電系統GB/T 18487.1-2023、連接裝置通用要求GB/T 20234.1-2023、交流充電接口GB/T 20234.2-2015、直流充電接口GB/T 20234.3-2023、非車載充電機與電池管理系統通訊GB/T 27930-2023、國內EMC或安全報告、中文標籤、工廠檢驗記錄和本地併網驗收。這些是有用的源文件，但應為阿曼進行翻譯、映射和補充。

gap.en: Create an Oman-facing dossier rather than forwarding the China domestic file unchanged. The dossier should include an English clause bridge, connector and communication configuration, nameplate and manual set, import documents, utility drawings, installer responsibilities, commissioning test forms, and a clear statement of what remains project-specific or unverified.
gap.zh: 应创建面向阿曼的资料包，而不是原样转发中国国内文件。资料包应包括英文条款映射、接口和通信配置、铭牌及说明书套件、进口文件、公用事业图纸、安装商责任、调试测试表，以及对仍属项目特定或未核验事项的清晰说明。
gap.zht: 應建立面向阿曼的資料包，而不是原樣轉發中國國內文件。資料包應包括英文條款映射、接口和通訊配置、銘牌及說明書套件、進口文件、公用事業圖紙、安裝商責任、調試測試表，以及對仍屬項目特定或未核驗事項的清晰說明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory content depends on Oman regulation, DGSM or customs scope, distributor connection process, tender, contract, and site approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T evidence is the China domestic baseline and must be mapped before being used as Oman-facing evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234.1-2023, GB/T 20234.2-2015, GB/T 20234.3-2023, and GB/T 27930-2023 reports are starting evidence, not an Oman approval. Translate, map, and supplement them against the Oman project route before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234.1-2023、GB/T 20234.2-2015、GB/T 20234.3-2023和GB/T 27930-2023报告是起始证据，不是阿曼批准。出货前应将其翻译、映射并按阿曼项目路径补充。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234.1-2023、GB/T 20234.2-2015、GB/T 20234.3-2023和GB/T 27930-2023報告是起始證據，不是阿曼批准。出貨前應將其翻譯、映射並按阿曼項目路徑補充。
